title: Copy into segfaults
poc: CREATE TABLE nodes (id serial, p POINT);
key_bug_features: Copy operation on POINT type causes segfault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE nodes (id serial PRIMARY KEY, p POINT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO nodes (id, p, name) VALUES (1, 'POINT(52.0697 4.3723)', 'Node A');
INSERT INTO nodes (id, p, name) VALUES (2, 'POINT(NULL NULL)', 'Node B');
INSERT INTO nodes (id, p, name) VALUES (3, 'POINT(0 0)', 'Node C');
